assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 56 of claude-md-result.md reads exactly '## Security Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 58-64 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' followed by all five fields with the exact expected values: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:', 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 67-70 of claude-md-result.md show '### Version Streams' with a table row: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 73-77 of claude-md-result.md show '### Source Repositories' with table rows: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 20) with a 2-row table, '## Jira Configuration' (line 25) with all standard fields, '## Code Intelligence' (line 33) with a '### Limitations' subsection (line 47), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 50).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 50-54 of claude-md-result.md show '## Bug Configuration' with exactly: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence:
Lines 32-44 of discovery-log.md read: '## Security Configuration

Security Configuration: **OPTED IN** by the user.

All Security Configuration fields were collected from the user:' followed by all field values including version streams and source repositories.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 11-15 of changes-log.md explicitly list both '## Bug Configuration — New section; populated with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks).' and '## Security Configuration — New section; opted in by the user. Includes three subsections: ### Product Lifecycle, ### Version Streams, ### Source Repositories.' The log header also states 'All sections below were newly added to CLAUDE.md'.
